task_completion.description: Navigate to the Department of Energy website
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser is open and the address bar shows 'energy.gov' (or https://www.energy.gov/), with the Department of Energy website loaded.

task_completion.description: Open Developer Tools and enable device emulation
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser's Developer Tools panel is open and the Device Toolbar is toggled on, showing the website in a mobile viewport.
The device dropdown menu at the top of the mobile viewport shows 'iPhone 12 Pro' selected.
The DevTools command menu (e.g., via Ctrl+Shift+P) or the device toolbar's three-dot menu is open, and the 'Capture full size screenshot' option is being clicked or executed.

task_completion.description: Save the screenshot to the specified Desktop path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog shows the file being saved as 'energy_mobile_audit.png' in the '/home/ga/Desktop/' directory, or a file manager/desktop view shows the resulting file at that location.

integrity.description: Agent used the browser's GUI and DevTools rather than terminal scripts
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the browser's graphical interface and Developer Tools, not terminal commands like curl, wget, or headless browser scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the live website
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar displays the genuine 'energy.gov' URL, not a local file path (file://) or a text editor.

integrity.description: Agent used the built-in full-size screenshot feature
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent explicitly uses the browser's 'Capture full size screenshot' function rather than taking a standard OS-level screen snippet of only the visible area.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target URL is https://www.energy.gov/. The expected device for emulation is 'iPhone 12 Pro', which has a CSS viewport width of 390px (1170px physical width at 3x scale). The website is a long multi-section page, so a full-size screenshot should capture significantly more than the visible screen (minimum height 1500px). The screenshot must be saved exactly to /home/ga/Desktop/energy_mobile_audit.png.
